# Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Registry addition
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Testing

- [ ] `go build ./...` clean
- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -tags=integration ./...` passes
- [ ] Tested manually on: <!-- macOS / Linux, shell, Go version -->

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] README or docs updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added (or justified in the description)
- [ ] Upstream compatibility preserved — change could theoretically land
      in [martinmose/agentlink](https://github.com/martinmose/agentlink)
      without a rewrite
